Dialogs.Response: Looking for the High Priest? The vault key and a weapon are in the armory to the west.
The dragon to the east won't give up her egg easily. Find the heavy fake one and try to trade.

Name: Dragon Mother
Description: Massive dragon guarding her small golden egg.

Dialogs.Response: *Growls* My small egg... I want a much bigger one!

Name: Dark Knight
Description: Huge knight in black armor. Threatens you with a greatsword.

Dialogs.Response: You shall not pass! No one enters the temple!

Name: High Priest
Description: Robed figure kneeling before eternal flames.

Dialogs.Response: Welcome. I need the Golden Egg and Dragon Scale to complete the ritual. Use the 'submit' command.
